name: John Doe
history: Recent move and stress related to settling into a new living space. Difficult relationship with parents, especially mother, described as judgmental and emotionally unsupportive. Friendships have become strained, contributing to isolation.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must meet my mother's expectations to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am a failure if I cannot live up to my family's standards.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of confrontation and compliance with family expectations.
situation: Preparing for a conversation with mother and expecting it to be challenging and superficial.
auto_thought: I will fail to meet her expectations and feel rejected.
behavior: Avoids confrontation and complies with family expectations to minimize conflict.
